seo.title: Programmatic SEO implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Programmatic SEO projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for deploying programmatic SEO campaigns at scale. It focuses on data integrity, template performance, and automated indexing strategies to ensure thousands of pages rank without triggering spam filters.

items.title: Schema Validation with Zod
items.description: Implement Zod or a similar library to validate all incoming data from CSVs, APIs, or databases before the build step to prevent runtime errors.

items.title: Duplicate Slug Detection
items.description: Run a script to identify and resolve duplicate URL slugs across the entire dataset to prevent routing conflicts.

items.title: Null and Empty Field Handling
items.description: Verify that templates have conditional logic to hide or replace UI sections when data fields are missing, preventing 'ghost' content placeholders.

items.title: Data Type Consistency
items.description: Ensure numeric fields (prices, counts) are correctly typed and formatted with locale-specific symbols before injection into templates.

items.title: Character Limit Verification
items.description: Check that string values for titles and descriptions do not exceed database or HTML length limits, which could truncate important SEO keywords.

items.title: Dynamic Meta Tag Injection
items.description: Verify that every page generates a unique <title> and <meta name="description"> using specific variables from the dataset.

items.title: Self-Referential Canonical Tags
items.description: Ensure every programmatically generated page contains a canonical link pointing to its own absolute URL to prevent duplicate content issues.

items.title: Semantic Header Hierarchy
items.description: Audit templates to ensure H1-H6 tags follow a logical hierarchy and that the H1 contains the primary target long-tail keyword.

items.title: JSON-LD Schema Implementation
items.description: Inject structured data (e.g., Product, FAQ, or LocalBusiness) dynamically based on the page content to improve Rich Snippet eligibility.

items.title: Image Alt Text Automation
items.description: Configure build scripts to generate descriptive alt text for images using primary and secondary keywords from the data row.

items.title: Breadcrumb Navigation
items.description: Implement a dynamic breadcrumb component that reflects the site hierarchy and provides path-based internal links.

items.title: Related Pages Component
items.description: Create a logic-based 'Related' section that links to 5-10 pages within the same category or geographic proximity to distribute link equity.

items.title: Crawl Depth Optimization
items.description: Verify that no programmatic page is more than 3 clicks away from the homepage using a crawler like Screaming Frog.

items.title: Hub and Spoke Linking
items.description: Ensure every 'spoke' (leaf page) links back to its parent 'hub' (category page) to strengthen topical authority.

items.title: HTML Sitemap Generation
items.description: Generate a paginated HTML sitemap for users and bots to discover pages that might not be prominently featured in the main navigation.

items.title: Minimum Word Count Filter
items.description: Set a threshold (e.g., 300 words) for AI-generated sections; discard or flag pages that fall below this to avoid 'thin content' penalties.

items.title: Keyword Stuffing Audit
items.description: Run a script to check keyword density in AI-generated paragraphs; ensure the primary keyword does not exceed 2-3% of the total text.

items.title: Fact-Checking Placeholders
items.description: Scan AI output for generic placeholders like [Insert Info] or [Company Name] that indicate generation failure.

items.title: Programmatic Variation Check
items.description: Compare 10 random pages to ensure the 'boilerplate' to 'unique content' ratio is healthy (ideally >30% unique content).

items.title: LLM Hallucination Filter
items.description: Use a secondary LLM pass or regex patterns to flag impossible data points (e.g., dates in the future or negative prices).

items.title: XML Sitemap Fragmentation
items.description: Split XML sitemaps into chunks of 40,000 URLs or 50MB to comply with Search Engine limits and improve indexing speed.

items.title: Image Optimization Pipeline
items.description: Automate the conversion of all external or dynamic images to WebP/AVIF format and implement lazy-loading.

items.title: Static Generation Strategy
items.description: Configure Next.js (ISR) or Astro to pre-render the top 10% of high-traffic pages while generating others on-demand to save build time.

items.title: Edge Caching Configuration
items.description: Set Cache-Control headers on Cloudflare or Vercel to cache programmatic pages for at least 24 hours to reduce server load.

items.title: Robots.txt Configuration
items.description: Explicitly define the path to all XML sitemap fragments within the robots.txt file.

items.title: GSC API Integration
items.description: Connect to the Google Search Console API to monitor indexing status and 'Crawled - currently not indexed' errors for specific sub-folders.

items.title: 404 Error Tracking
items.description: Set up alerts for spikes in 404 errors, which often indicate a breaking change in the programmatic URL generation logic.

items.title: Core Web Vitals Sampling
items.description: Run Lighthouse or PageSpeed Insights on a representative sample of 50 programmatic pages to ensure template-wide performance.

items.title: Search Intent Alignment Check
items.description: Manually review 20 pages to ensure the programmatically generated content actually answers the query implied by the URL slug.

items.title: Conversion Rate Tracking
items.description: Embed unique tracking IDs or hidden fields in CTAs to attribute conversions to specific programmatic clusters.
